component.name: StreamResolver
component.script:
sub init() m.top.functionName = "resolver" end sub
sub resolver() readInternet = CreateObject("roUrlTransfer") readInternet.setCertificatesFile("common:/certs/ca-bundle.crt") readInternet.initClientCertificates() readInternet.setUrl(m.top.uri) readInternet.addHeader("Accept", "application/json")
response = readInternet.GetToString() print "RESOLVER URL: "; m.top.uri print "RESOLVER RESPONSE: "; response
json = ParseJson(response) if json <> invalid and json.url <> invalid and json.url <> "" content = CreateObject("roSGNode", "ContentNode") if json.title <> invalid and json.title <> "" content.title = json.title else content.title = m.top.title end if content.url = json.url if json.streamformat <> invalid content.streamFormat = json.streamformat else content.streamFormat = "hls" end if content.contentType = "movie" m.top.content = content else if json <> invalid and json.error <> invalid m.top.error = json.error else m.top.error = "No se pudo obtener el stream reproducible." end if end if end sub
